content_body:
Winner of the 2014 Best of B&B Award for Most Romantic Venue in the Asheville Area, McGuire’s Millrace Farm is your premier southern wedding destination. They specialize in elegant, rustic chic barn weddings you've never seen before. From their classic antique decor to their gorgeous grounds, from their attentive staff to their award-winning chef, McGuire's Millrace Farm is sure to provide the mountain wedding of your dreams. Just ask these previous brides. 

The Location

Nestled in the heart of the Appalachian Mountains in Western North Carolina, just 40 minutes from Blue Ridge, your guests will be surrounded by majestic mountains, rolling fields, peaceful breezes, and the magic that McGuire’s Millrace Farm is all about.

The Barn

6,600 square feet. 30' ceilings. Wrought iron chandeliers and polished concrete floors. This is not your typical barn venue. The space accommodates small or large events and features beautiful hardwood tables and chairs, as well as the latest in technology.

The Grounds 

This locale gives you the option of having your ceremony amongst a majestic line of river birches that encompass you and your guests or at the arbor nestled in a rolling field while the carriage horses graze and the mountains rise in the background.  Another top choice is at the arched footbridge amongst the flowers and the placid waters of the pond.  If the weather turns inclement, you can move the entire wedding inside at no extra charge.
title: McGuire's Millrace Farm
